name: openEuler sig-epkg SIG
description: epkg is a package manager for installing multi-version software in multiple environments

name: openEuler sig-epkg SIG Repository List
description: openEuler sig-epkg SIG maintains 8 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-epkg SIG (Special Interest Group) is responsible for epkg is a package manager for installing multi-version software in multiple environments. The SIG has 9 core members and maintains 8 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler sig-epkg SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler sig-epkg SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at sig-epkg@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler sig-epkg SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-epkg SIG maintains 8 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/sig-epkg.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler sig-epkg SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-epkg SIG has 6 Maintainers, including: Fengguang Wu, Kai Liu, Wayne Ren. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
